note: Arbitrary code execution when loading untrusted YAML with full_load. Upgrade PyYAML to 5.4 or later (use a wheel-available release) and use yaml.safe_load.
Arbitrary code execution through the FullLoader. Upgrade PyYAML to a current release with a wheel for this Python.
Regular expression denial of service in the urlize filter. Upgrade Jinja2 to 2.11.3 or later.
XSS via the xmlattr filter. Upgrade Jinja2 to 3.1.3 or later.
Credentials leaked to the destination after an HTTPS to HTTP redirect. Upgrade requests to 2.20.0 or later.
Proxy-Authorization header leaked on cross-origin redirect. Upgrade requests to 2.31.0 or later.
Denial of service from a very long crafted URL. Upgrade urllib3 to 1.26.5 or later.
Certificate verification weakened with a custom SSL context. Upgrade urllib3 to 1.24.2 or later.
Out-of-bounds read in BLP image handling. Upgrade Pillow to a current release with a wheel for this Python.
Arbitrary code execution via ImageMath.eval. Upgrade Pillow to a current release with a wheel for this Python.
Integer overflow in symmetric encryption. Upgrade cryptography to a current release with a wheel for this Python.
Bleichenbacher timing oracle in RSA decryption. Upgrade cryptography to a current release with a wheel for this Python.
Incomplete string comparison in numpy.core. Upgrade numpy to a current release with a wheel for this Python (1.26 or later for Python 3.12).
Cross-site scripting via the HTML cleaner. Upgrade lxml to a current release with a wheel for this Python.
NULL pointer dereference in iterwalk. Upgrade lxml to a current release with a wheel for this Python.
Open redirect in the client. Upgrade aiohttp to a current release with a wheel for this Python.
Session cookie may be cached by a proxy and exposed. Upgrade Flask to 2.3.2 or later.
Denial of service via many multipart form parts. Upgrade Werkzeug to 2.2.3 or later.
Removed the compromised e-Tugra root certificate. Upgrade certifi to 2023.7.22 or later.
Denial of service from a very long domain name. Upgrade idna to 3.7 or later.
Regular expression denial of service in package_index. Upgrade setuptools to 65.5.1 or later.
Regular expression denial of service. Upgrade sqlparse to 0.4.4 or later.
SQL injection: do not build SQL by string formatting of user input. Use parameterised queries or an ORM so input is bound, not concatenated.
Cross-site scripting: escape or sanitise user input before putting it in HTML. Rely on template auto-escaping and avoid mark_safe on raw input.
